name: Baby-Step Giant-Step
description: Solve the discrete logarithm g^x ≡ h (mod p) in O(√p) time using meet-in-the-middle.
intuition: Write x = im - j where m = ⌈√p⌉. Baby steps: precompute h·g^j for j=0..m-1. Giant steps: compute g^(im) for i=0..m, look up in the table. When a match is found, x = im - j.
